creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I think it's reasonable to extend it however for reasonable amount of time since we are likely to see breakage and end up "maintaining" it ourselves which is less than ideal given that it's abandoned upstream (including what all that entails).

That being said, security/veracrypt should be more or less a direct replacement and there's also https://github.com/radumarias/rencfs that might be of interest.

Best regads,
Daniel
